A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
In execute_python (function-call-13899015464807204987), the agent manually assigned torvalds/linux a main language of "C" despite no languages record (see query_db function-call-4092120059926940335 returning no torvalds/linux), thereby including it in the non-Python top-5 when combining with commit counts (function-call-10694482225128531242) and excluding the correct repository tensorflow/tensorflow.
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: no
FM3: no
